title: verbascum longifolium
intro: Verbascum longifolium, also known as long-leaved mullein, is a biennial plant in the figwort family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Verbascum longifolium include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural expectorant to relieve coughs and colds. Verbascum longifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical creams and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
